title: P2: save_key_package sends INVALID_REQUEST code for DB error
description: relay/src/ws.rs: save_key_package Err path sends rpc_errors::INVALID_REQUEST (-32600) but labels message 'internal error'. Wrong code — clients misclassify server fault as client error. Fix: change to INTERNAL_ERROR (-32603).
close_reason: Fixed in same session: save_key_package now sends INTERNAL_ERROR (-32603); get_key_package now matches on Result and sends INTERNAL_ERROR on DB error instead of swallowing as None.
